insights.title: Why Learning Engineering is the missing layer in EdTech
insights.excerpt: Most EdTech products are built by engineers or educators — rarely both. Learning Engineering bridges that gap, treating curriculum as a product and learners as users.

insights.title: Building for the next billion learners: a mobile-first, low-bandwidth playbook
insights.excerpt: Designing for learners in rural Kenya, Ghana, or Rwanda means rethinking every assumption about connectivity, device capability, and data cost. Here's how we approach it.

insights.title: AI tutors are coming — but are they learning engineers?
insights.excerpt: The rush to add AI to learning platforms often skips the curriculum design step entirely. We break down what AI can and can't replace in the learning engineering stack.

prototypes.name: TinkerWith Me
prototypes.description: A curriculum selector for Robotics & AI — helps young learners and educators navigate hands-on project pathways based on age, interest, and skill level.

prototypes.name: Secure360
prototypes.description: A cyber security assessment tool that helps individuals and teams understand their digital security posture through structured, plain-language evaluation.

prototypes.name: Anchor
prototypes.description: A self-regulation gym — a wellbeing tool that guides users through evidence-based practices for emotional regulation, focus, and resilience. Learning that starts from the inside out.

prototypes.name: Digital Prayer Companion
prototypes.description: A reflective digital companion for personal prayer and spiritual journaling — offering guided prompts, scripture, and space for quiet daily practice.

prototypes.name: Track My Chumz
prototypes.description: A personal budgeting tool designed for the Kenyan context — helping users track income, expenses, and savings goals with a simple, mobile-friendly interface.

prototypes.name: Career Templates AI
prototypes.description: AI-assisted career document builder — generates tailored CVs, cover letters, and LinkedIn summaries. Designed to help job seekers in African markets put their best foot forward.

prototypes.name: Reset Guide
prototypes.description: A new-year reflection and goal-setting simulator for individuals and groups — walks users through a structured reset process using a gears metaphor to align values, habits, and intentions.

prototypes.name: DPIA Safe Lab
prototypes.description: A Data Protection Impact Assessment sandbox — guides organisations through DPIA exercises to identify privacy risks in learning products and digital systems.
